title: Zadawi
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Zadawi.jpg]] |name=Zadawi |homeworld=[[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]][[Knights of the Old Republic 16|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 16]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Arkanian Offshoot/Legends|Arkanian Offshoot]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|White]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=White |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|…I'm always up for putting one over on the purebloods.|Zadawi|}} '''Zadawi''' was an [[Arkanian Offshoot/Legends|Arkanian Offshoot]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived on the outskirts of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Adascopolis]], ancient [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]], during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Owing to Arkania's segregationist policies that separated Offshoots from [[Blood/Legends|pureblood]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanians]], Zadawi was forced to live with her [[Zadawi's father|father]] and [[Zadawi's grandmother|grandmother]] in a small hut on the site of a derelict [[Mining/Legends|mining]] camp just outside Adascopolis, which they were forbidden to enter. Rebellious and infuriated by the discrimination against her people, Zadawi often sneaked into Adascopolis with her friends in disguise. In [[3963 BBY]], Zadawi met an Offshoot named [[Jarael]], an offworlder who was unfamiliar with the plight of the Offshoots and was attempting to procure a medical diagnosis for an ailing [[Gorman Vandrayk|friend]]. When Jarael was barred entry to Adascopolis, Zadawi took it upon herself to educate Jarael about what life was like for Offshoots on Arkania and took Jarael back to her home. Zadawi eventually helped Jarael disguise herself as a pureblood Arkanian and sneak into Adascopolis. ==Biography== {{Quote|The purebloods bred the Offshoots to be better miners—but once the gems ran out, there wasn't much else for us to do. Now, this is one of the places where Offshoots are allowed to live."
"''Allowed?'' What does that mean? And why wouldn't they let me go to the medcenter in Adascopolis?''"
"''Wow. You really did grow up offworld, didn't you? Follow me. It's time you learned something about your people.|Zadawi and Jarael|}} [[File:ZadawiJarael.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Zadawi became acquainted with Jarael on a shuttlebus in the Adascopolis spaceport.]] An [[Arkanian Offshoot/Legends|Arkanian Offshoot]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Zadawi lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] during the era of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Zadawi's people, the Offshoots, were a sub-[[Species/Legends|species]] [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] by [[Blood/Legends|pureblood]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanians]] to be more efficient [[Mining/Legends|miners]] and faced significant discrimination on Arkania. By [[3963 BBY]], Zadawi lived in a hut on the site of a deserted mining camp on the outskirts of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Adascopolis]], ancient [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of Arkania,{{CSWECite|I|11|Adascopolis}} with her [[Zadawi's father|father]] and [[Zadawi's grandmother|grandmother]]. Zadawi, like other Offshoots, was not allowed to enter the city, but over the [[Standard year/Legends|years]], she and her friends made a habit of [[Clothing/Legends|dressing]] up in disguise and sneaking into Adascopolis. The mistreatment of the Offshoots at the hands of the pureblood Arkanians, along with what she saw as a defeated attitude amongst the rest of her people, sometimes drove Zadawi to want to run away. One [[Standard day/Legends|day]] in 3963 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], she decided to go to the Adascopolis [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] to perhaps look for a way offplanet. There, she collided with another Offshoot, [[Jarael]], who had come from offworld and was unfamiliar with her surroundings. Jarael's [[Goggles/Legends|goggles]] were knocked off in the collision, leading spaceport security to notice that she was an Offshoot and force her onto the [[shuttlebus]] leading back to Zadawi's settlement outside the city. Zadawi became acquainted with Jarael on the shuttlebus—the offworlder had come to Arkania to obtain a medical diagnosis for her friend, an elderly Offshoot called [[Gorman Vandrayk|Camper]]. Shocked by Jarael's lack of knowledge about the plight of her people, Zadawi brought her back to her home for dinner. Wanting to show Jarael what life was really like for Offshoots on Arkania, Zadawi began arguing with her [[Parent/Legends|grandmother]] when the other woman defended the [[House of Adasca]], the rich and powerful pureblood Arkanian family that ran the biomechanical corporation known as [[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania|Adascorp]], and Arkania's segregationist policies. Frustrated, Zadawi decided to help Jarael sneak into Adascopolis in order to "put one over on the purebloods." Zadawi aided Jarael in acquiring a passable pureblood Arkanian disguise, which succeeded in getting her safe passage into Adascopolis. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|It's like we've been put down so long that now we're a party to our own degradation. I just want to run away sometimes. Today, I was up at the spaceport, looking for a freighter that needed a hand—anything. But that wouldn't help people like my grandmother. I'd rather solve the problem here.|Zadawi|}} [[File:ZadawiDinner.jpg|thumb|right|270px|Zadawi befriended and helped the fellow Offshoot Jarael.]] A rebellious girl, Zadawi was disgusted by the treatment of her people on Arkania and deeply desired to help solve the problems facing the Offshoots. She and her friends were also always willing to break the rules and cause trouble for the purebloods, including dressing up in disguise to sneak into Adascopolis. Zadawi was dismayed by the forgiving attitude toward Adascorp and the purebloods that she saw amongst many of the Offshoots, including her grandmother. Believing that they had become party to their own degradation, Zadawi often wanted to leave them all behind but realized that escaping would not do anything to help. Zadawi held Adascorp in little esteem, believing that they would rather help strangers for [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]] instead of aiding Offshoots suffering in their own backyard. Zadawi felt that it was her responsibility to show Jarael, an offworlder unfamiliar with the situation on Arkania, what life was really like for Offshoots on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Zadawi was initially shocked by the extent of Jarael's ignorance but befriended her anyway and eventually helped her sneak into Adascopolis. Zadawi had [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], white skin, and blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and wore four [[Piercing/Legends|earrings]] on each [[Ear/Legends|ear]]. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|For Zadawi, I asked Brian to come up with someone that would really hold a mirror up to Jarael. Not just literally (as she does in this issue), but suggesting what Jarael's life might have been like if she'd lived in the forbidding recesses of Arkania, rather than Taris. Zadawi's got a spunky against-all-odds resilience about her, and I think Brian captured that well.|John Jackson Miller|{{Faraway|url=comics/swknights/swkotor16.html|text=''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #16''}}}} Zadawi first appeared in the [[Knights of the Old Republic 16|sixteenth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series. The issue was written by [[John Jackson Miller]], illustrated by [[Brian Ching]], and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[May 2]], [[2007]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/14-397/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-16|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #16}} Ching came up with the design of Zadawi after being tasked by Miller with designing a character who would "hold up a mirror" to Jarael and reflect what life would have been like for her had she grown up on Arkania. ==Appearances== *[[Knights of the Old Republic 16|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 16]] {{1st}} *[[Knights of the Old Republic 36|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 36]] {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Zadawi}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Zadawi |pl=Zadawi }} [[Category:Arkanians]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]]
